title: How I Built This Website — From Scratch with HTML, CSS & JS
excerpt: No CMS. No WordPress. Just a text editor, Claude Code, and GitHub Pages. Here is how this portfolio was built and how new posts are added.
coverCaption: The repository structure — every post is a JSON entry and an HTML file.

title: Phishathon 2025 — Social Engineering in Practice
excerpt: A hands-on phishing competition that went beyond labs — deepfakes, public-figure scenarios, and the lesson that method matters more than tricks.

title: .NET 10 Demystified — A Security Student's Perspective
excerpt: A deep dive into .NET 10 features, performance tuning, and cloud-ready architecture — and why it matters even if your focus is security.

title: Tech & Meet — Transitioning to IPv6
excerpt: IPv4 exhaustion is no longer theoretical. This session covered dual-stack deployments, migration strategy, and the security implications of IPv6.
speakerBio: Networking expert with deep practical experience in IPv6 migration and infrastructure planning.

title: NATO Cyber Defence — From Strategy to Reality
excerpt: How NATO rethought defence for the digital domain — and why cybersecurity is now a shared responsibility across borders, sectors, and communities.
speakerBio: Expert on NATO cyber strategy and multinational cyber defence frameworks.

title: Tech & Meet — DeepSeek and the Future of AI
excerpt: DeepSeek's approach to efficiency and openness is reshaping AI development. Here is what it means for cybersecurity and threat modelling.
